channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/12)
channel.description: 今天的技术圈，依然是AI和Agent的天下。有超快的推理引擎、帮你写代码的终端Agent、还有关于AI Agent工作效率的深度探讨。同时，几个有意思的开发者讨论也值得一看，比如“AI写代码时代，该用什么架构？”和“Rust在中国到底火没火？” 来看看吧！

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的技术圈，依然是AI和Agent的天下。有超快的推理引擎、帮你写代码的终端Agent、还有关于AI Agent工作效率的深度探讨。同时，几个有意思的开发者讨论也值得一看，比如“AI写代码时代，该用什么架构？”和“Rust在中国到底火没火？” 来看看吧！

item.title: strukto-ai/mirage
item.description: A Unified Virtual Filesystem For AI Agents | 近期热门 | 总 1949 stars
item.author: strukto-ai

item.title: yaojingang/yao-open-prompts

item.author: yaojingang

item.title: lightseekorg/tokenspeed
item.description: TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine. | 近期热门 | 总 945 stars
item.author: lightseekorg

item.title: darkrishabh/agent-skills-eval
item.description: A test runner for agentskills.io-style AI agent skills | 近期热门 | 总 430 stars
item.author: darkrishabh

item.title: PentHertz/LUKSbox
item.description: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows. | 近期热门 | 总 428 stars
item.author: PentHertz

item.title: wojtczyk/trust
item.description: TRUST – Coding Rust like it's 1989 | 近期热门 | 总 203 stars
item.author: wojtczyk

item.title: zy-zmc/tianming-novel-ai-writer
item.description: 天命 — AI网文创作系统 | 12维事实快照 · 9类变更声明 · 6道生成门禁 | 写到3000章依然连贯，不靠模型记忆，靠每章状态回写 | 近期热门 | 总 117 stars
item.author: zy-zmc

item.title: usewhale/whale
item.description: DeepSeek CLI / terminal coding agent with MCP, Skills, shell tools, and prefix-cache optimization. | 近期热门 | 总 83 stars
item.author: usewhale
